Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self.labelText = Auctionator.Constants.Durations.Short; self.value = 12; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self.labelText = Auctionator.Constants.Durations.Medium; self.value = 24; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self.labelText = Auctionator.Constants.Durations.Long; self.value = 48; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonGroupMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigHorizontalRadioButtonGroupMixin); self.groupHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DURATION; self:InitializeRadioButtonGroup()
